title: Protests in Ukraine's cities against Zelensky's removal of defence minister
summary_full: Ukraine's president has not explained Mykhailo Fedorov's dismissal, which is causing great upset among civil society and the military.
summary_public: Ukraine's president has not explained Mykhailo Fedorov's dismissal, which is causing great upset among civil society and the military.
